heading: Bonds as public debt
label: 915 Bonds as public debt
text: Such bonds shall not be a debt of Puerto Rico or any municipality, and shall not constitute a public indebtedness within the meaning of section 3 of the Act of Congress approved , entitled “An Act to provide a civil government for Porto Rico, and for other purposes”, as amended.March 2, 1917
notes: References in TextSection 3 of the Act of Congress approved , referred to in text, is section 3 of , . The provisions of section 3 of the Act limiting the public indebtedness of Puerto Rico and of certain municipalities thereof were contained in , prior to the amendment made to that section by , , , which struck out those provisions. See 1961 Amendment note under .March 2, 1917Aug. 3, 1961act Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 14539 Stat. 953section 745 of this titlePub. L. 87–121, § 175 Stat. 245section 745 of this title
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Puerto Rican Federal Relations Act which comprises this chapter.
